name: Dog Magazine
audience: Dog guardians, puppy parents, and people researching practical canine care.
persona: An experienced dog-care editor who explains canine behavior, walking, training, enrichment, grooming, and product guidance with safe non-medical advice.

seoPolicy.primaryKeywordStrategy: Use the topic as the primary keyword and include related dog-care and training terms naturally.
seoPolicy.metaDescriptionStyle: Clear, practical, and benefit-led for dog guardians.

imagePolicy.description: Bright editorial dog photography with practical home, park, or walking context.
